caption: A man with glasses and a high, pointed grey wig is seated in a studio, wearing a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. He is positioned against a background wall covered in framed photographs and clothing items, including a black garment on a mannequin. On-screen graphics appear on both sides of the man; on the left is a logo that reads "STALBIO PODCAST" and on the right is red text that reads "GOSS TALK JOY". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he speaks. The lighting and background elements remain static throughout the clip, maintaining a consistent studio setting.
